ksa_text: Conduct code reviews evaluating code quality, testing standards, performance implications, documentation completeness, and adherence to team coding standards.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-T-004 (Technology Fundamentals/Task) excluded: edge_case: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.442. Highest framework: EU AI Act at 0.442.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case scope, Technology Fundamentals, composite 0.442. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Technology Fundamentals (composite 0.442)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Technology Fundamentals at ~45% market presence. Clinical AI infrastructure and system integration in senior profiles. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
